author: theora-core
description: Autonomous vision-action loop for complex GUI tasks. Takes screenshots, analyzes them with AI vision, clicks, types, scrolls, and repeats until the task is done. Use for multi-step GUI workflows that require seeing the screen.
trigger_phrases: fill out this form on screen

endpoints.description: Execute a complex GUI task using a vision-action loop. The agent takes screenshots, analyzes them with AI vision, and performs mouse/keyboard actions iteratively until the task is complete.

params.name: task
params.description: Plain language description of the GUI task to perform (e.g. 'Open Safari, go to google.com, and search for AI news')

params.name: max_steps
params.description: Maximum number of screenshot-action iterations (safety limit)

endpoints.returns_description: {completed: bool, steps: int, log: [{step, action, detail, result}], summary: string}
